approaches.title: Single-pass range aggregation
approaches.summary: Tracks the start and previous value of each range in one pass, emitting a formatted range whenever a gap is found. Revision 2 cleans up the control flow and idi

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial single-pass implementation that handles duplicates, consecutive values, gaps, and final range emission.
Refactors range formatting and combines duplicate/consecutive checks while preserving the same single-pass strategy.
